content.full_text:
April 26, 1990

Lance H. Olson
Olson, Connelly, Hagel, Fong & Leidigh
300 Capitol Mall, Suite 350
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request For Advice
Our File No. A-90-235

Dear Mr. Olson:

You have requested confirmation of telephone assistance provided to you on behalf of the Sacramento Metropolitan Registration Fund, concerning the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.1/

Your letter dated March 22, 1990, correctly summarizes the advice I provided that the Sacramento Metropolitan Registration Fund is not required to file pre-election statements pursuant to Section 84200.5 for any pre-election period during which the committee does not make contributions or independent expenditures. The committee's activities consist of voter registration activities, and no reference is made to specific candidates.

The committee is required to file semi-annual statements. However, please note that the filing deadline for the semi-annual statement covering January 1 through June 30 is July 31, 1990.

If you have any questions about this letter, please call me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

By: Jeanne Pritchard
Division Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
